nasb.text: He said to me, “Son of man, these are the men who devise iniquity and give evil advice in this city,

esv.text: And he said to me, “Son of man, these are the men who devise iniquity and who give wicked counsel in this city;

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：“人子啊！這些就是圖謀罪孽，在這城裡設惡謀的人。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“人子啊，这些人在这城里专给人出毒计，设恶谋。
